errors: family must be one of the approved crazy families

schema.idea: Daily earthquake activity spike near major freight hubs with short-term XLI weakness

data.source: USGS daily earthquake activity near freight hubs and Yahoo Finance daily XLI prices

schema.behavior: Increased seismic activity near freight hubs can disrupt supply chains, pressuring industrial stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Supply chain disruption risks weigh on industrial sector.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLI if daily earthquakes >3 magnitude increase by 50% day-over-day near key hubs and XLI underperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 5 trading days or when earthquake activity normalizes

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity fluctuates daily with occasional regional surges.
